data.title: Execute smoke test: re-run implementation-plan on 8163-83a4
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Re-run /dso:implementation-plan on the paused instruction-file story 8163-83a4 and verify:
1. The resulting plan passes TDD plan review without deadlocking on behavioral assertion demands
2. The TDD reviewer scores instruction-file tasks against the boundary rule (Rule 5)
3. No behavioral correctness assertions are demanded for non-executable artifacts

This is a manual/integration verification step executed within the sprint session. The smoke test confirms the end-to-end effectiveness of the unified testing philosophy.

## File Impact
- (no files modified — verification only)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] /dso:implementation-plan is invoked on story 8163-83a4
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 8163-83a4 (confirm story exists and is accessible)
- [ ] Resulting plan passes TDD plan review without deadlocking
  Verify: Manual verification — document result in ticket comment
- [ ] TDD reviewer does not demand behavioral correctness assertions for instruction-file tasks
  Verify: Manual verification — document in ticket comment that no behavioral assertion demands appeared
